name: @automovie/test
description: automovie test program ??exhaustive deterministic engine validation

scripts.coverage: cd .. && c8 --src packages/engine/src --src packages/forge/src --src packages/ingest/src --src packages/render/src --include "packages/engine/src/**" --include "packages/forge/src/**" --include "packages/ingest/src/**" --include "packages/render/src/**" --exclude "**/index.ts" --extension .ts --temp-directory node_modules/.cache/automovie-c8 --reports-dir node_modules/.cache/automovie-c8-report --reporter=text-summary --check-coverage --branches 100 --functions 100 --lines 100 --statements 100 ttsx -P test/tsconfig.json test/src/index.ts

author: Samchon
